headline.zh-CN: 头像刷新后不再显示为坏图
headline.en: Avatars now keep rendering after refresh

summary.zh-CN: 修复头像上传成功后刷新页面会从前端站点路径加载图片的问题。头像现在会使用与其他上传资源一致的后端资源地址。
summary.en: Fixes avatar images loading from the frontend site path after a successful upload. Avatars now use the same backend asset URL handling as other uploaded resources.

title.zh-CN: 修复头像上传后的刷新显示

description.zh-CN: 个人资料页和侧边栏头像现在会解析到正确的上传资源地址，在前端和后端分开部署时不会再请求错误的 `/uploads` 路径。
description.en: Profile and sidebar avatars now resolve to the correct uploaded asset URL, so split frontend/backend deployments no longer request the wrong `/uploads` path.
